frequency.description:
String with frequency of a data series. Allowed values:
- "D" (daily)
- "W" (weekly)
- "AW" (actual weekly)
- "M" (monthly)
- "AM" (actual monthly)
- "Q" (quarterly)
- "FQ" (fiscal quarterly)
- "CQ" (calendar quarterly)
- "AQ" (actual quarterly)
- "Y" (yearly)
- "FY" (fiscal yearly)
- "CY" (calendar yearly)
- "AY" (actual yearly)
- "MTD" (month-to-date)
- "QTD" (quarter-to-date)
- "YTD" (year-to-date)
- "FYTD" (fiscal-year-to-date)
- "CYTD" (calendar-year-to-date)
